products.title: Alternative Latte Bin
products.body_html: 1.4 liter plastic storage bin for powdered lattes with 1 Tbs serving spoon that snaps into the lid

products.title: Premium Milk Frother
products.body_html: This frother is the perfect compliment to your latte routine. Easy to use with the click of a button, this frother creates velvety foam that will have you looking forward to your next latte. Our favorite feature is the top that protects and keeps your frother clean when not in use.

products.title: Two Leaves Display Tin Kit - Empty
products.body_html: Kit of 9 refillable Two Leaves and a Bud sachet display tins and one set of tin labels. Versatile to fit your space!

products.title: Two Leaves Empty 6 Slot Bamboo Presentation Box
products.body_html: Now available in a 6-slot! This six slot bamboo tea chest measures 11 in w x 7.5 in d x 4.75 in h

products.title: Two Leaves Counter Top Rack for 9 Tea Boxes
products.body_html: Wire countertop rack that holds 9 teas. 3 boxes wide, 3 layers tall measured 11.75 in w x 5.5 in d x 22 in h

products.title: Square Tin For Sachet Dispensing
products.body_html: Refillable individual tins for sachets that can be stacked tall or lined up. Versatile to fit your space! Order the Flavor Labels with them (item POS-TIN-LABEL). Each tin is 4 in w x 6 in h x 4 in d.

products.title: Iced Tea Cling
products.body_html: Branded clings for Iced Tea dispensers.

products.title: Two Leaves and a Bud Branded Band Wrap
products.body_html: Two Leaves and a Bud band wrap for iced tea dispenser. Fits narrow 3.5gal iced tea dispensers Bunn TDO-N-3.5 or Curtis TCN 3.5

products.title: Alpine Berry Herbal Iced Tea 3 oz.
products.body_html:
A 3 oz portion pack crafted with our Wholesale Partners in mind. A bulk solution that requires a commercial brewer for use.

Alpine Berry herbal tea is naturally sweet and tart with hibiscus, blackberry leaves, and orange peel. This bright berry tea brews up a jewel-toned shade of red thanks to hibiscus – popular worldwide for its tart, cranberry-like flavor. The taste of this herbal blend reminds us of a hike in the mountains of Colorado, where we live. It's refreshing hot or iced.

Case contains 24 3oz portion packs; each make 3 gallons of tea. Note: a commercial brewer is needed to brew this tea.

products.title: Two Leaves Filled Rack for 9 Teas
products.body_html: Wire countertop rack filled with 9 of our 15-count top selling sachet tea boxes. 3 boxes wide, 3 layers tall measured 11.75 in w x 5.5 in d x 22 in h

products.title: Filled Display Tin with 9 Teas
products.body_html:
This countertop-worthy magnetic display is a great way to get started with Two Leaves and a Bud!

Designed to get our wholesale partners up and running quickly with our hot tea selection. This Two Leaves and a Bud Kit of 9 display tins is filled with 9 15-count boxes, one each of our top sellers. Tin label sheet is included. These high-quality tins are magnetic and stackable; a versatile display option!

products.title: Two Leaves and a Bud Retail Box Starter Kit
products.body_html:
Two Leaves and a Bud Retail Box Starter Kit contains 3 Retail Boxes of 8 top selling teas. This kit includes a mix of black, green and herbals teas, subject to change upon availability.
24 Boxes of 15 sachets, 360 total sachets. 
Product image may not represent the contents of the Two Leaves Starter Kit.

products.title: Un-Conventional Black Iced Tea, 3.5 oz.
products.body_html:
This non-organic iced tea is anything but conventional! Same great taste as our Organic Black Iced Tea, but with twice the amount of tea in each case. 

Case contains 48 3.5oz portion packs; each make 3.5 gallons of tea.

products.title: Tropical Green Organic Iced Tea 3 oz.
products.body_html:
Take your taste buds on a holiday! This tea has all the taste of a full leaf green tea with the bonus of refreshing tropical flavors. It has a refreshing melon-berry taste, so we love it iced too…with a tiny umbrella.

Case contains 24 3oz portion packs; each make 3 gallons of tea. Note: a commercial brewer is needed to brew this tea.

products.title: Black Organic Iced Tea 3 oz.
products.body_html:
A 3 oz portion pack crafted with our Wholesale Partners in mind. A bulk solution that requires a commercial brewer for use.

Smooth, but robust, these black organic tea leaves yield a complexity of flavor that will have you smacking your lips after every taste! Not just any iced tea — this select orange pekoe tea from Assam, India, demands to be tasted before you even think about adding sweetener. Note its malty flavor and amber color and then decide if you want to sweeten your glass for a seriously addictive, refreshing glass of tea.

Case contains 24 3oz portion packs; each make 3 gallons of tea. Note: a commercial brewer is needed to brew this tea.

products.title: Day to Night Tea Sampler Gift Box
products.body_html: A classic collection of our six best-selling teas across black, green and herbal varieties curated for a journey that takes the sipper from day to night. Includes one box each of Organic English Breakfast, Organic Earl Grey, Organic Tropical Green, Alpine Berry, Organic Peppermint, and Organic Chamomile. The sampler pack is packed in a Two Leaves and a Bud gift box.

products.title: Black Tea Trio
products.body_html:
A trio of bold black teas. Indulge in our robust Organic Assam, savor our spiced Organic Mountain High Chai, and unwind with our citrus-y classic Organic Earl Grey. 

Trio includes 3 boxes of 15 wrapped whole leaf tea sachets: 1 box Organic Assam, 1 box Organic Mountain High Chai, 1 box Organic Earl Grey.

products.title: Herbal Tea Trio
products.body_html:
A trio of soothing herbal teas. Refresh with our bright Alpine Berry, invigorate with our Organic Peppermint, and relax with our lush Organic Chamomile.

Trio includes 3 boxes of 15 wrapped whole leaf tea sachets: 1 box Organic Peppermint, 1 box Alpine Berry, 1 box Organic Chamomile.

products.title: Green Tea Trio
products.body_html:
A trio of invigorating green teas. Experience the delicate aroma of our Organic Jasmine Petal, escape with our Organic Tropical Green, and brighten your day with our classic Organic Tamayokucha. 

Trio includes 3 boxes of 15 wrapped whole leaf tea sachets: 1 box Organic Jasmine Petal, 1 box Organic Tropical Green, 1 box Organic Tamayokucha.

products.title: Traditional Ceremonial Matcha
products.body_html:
Now in a NEW bulk size, this 250g sleeve is the answer for high matcha demand! 

This premium ceremonial grade matcha is made from the finest first-flush leaves. Its verdant green color gives way to a full bodied and complex cup with a delicate sweetness, balanced with mild umami and a velvet-like mouthfeel.

250g sleeve. 1.5g suggested serving size.

products.title: Barista Chai Tea Latte Mix
products.body_html:
Barista Chai is our newest addition! Sweeter than our Nice Chai and in a larger bag size. This is a true Masala Chai with Indian and African black teas with a hand-crafted spice blend including cinnamon, cardamom, clove and ginger. Full of flavor, easy to mix, versatile and simple to use. 

240 gram sleeve contains 8 servings.
907 gram sleeve contains 30 servings.

products.title: Ceremonial Matcha Tea Single-Serve Sticks
products.body_html: Ceremonial grade matcha in convenient, single-serve to-go packs, perfectly measured for a ceremonial matcha bowl, or small water bottle. It’s everything we love: top-of-the-world tasty, portable, and accessible!

products.title: Organic Matcha Mint - 15 Naked Tea Sachets
products.body_html:
Green, green, green! Premium organic matcha (Japanese stone-ground green tea) is blended with whole-leaf organic green tea and organic American peppermint for a healthy, refreshing, and energizing tea trifecta. A hint of mango rounds out the tea for a bright, balanced cup.

- Green tea two ways + Mint
- Light Caffeine with slow release
- Balanced, clean and bright flavors

Get Naked!

Our new Naked 15s are perfect for those who are notoriously picky about their tea and their savings. With 15 whole leaf tea sachets per sleeve, it offers the best price per sachet – nearly a 30% savings over a box of 15!

This Organic Matcha Mint green tea is “naked”, meaning each sachet is stripped of its outer envelope, giving you more of the delicious, whole-leaf flavor with less waste. Less packaging means less impact on the environment and better savings for you. Everyone benefits!

products.title: Organic African Sunset Tea - 15 Naked Tea Sachets
products.body_html:
We named this organic rooibos “African Sunset” to honor its origin in South Africa, where it is cultivated for its woody-sweet, earthy flavor. Our blend includes a touch of lemongrass to brighten this traditional red tea.

Our new Naked 15s are perfect for those who are notoriously picky about their tea and their savings. With 15 whole leaf tea sachets per sleeve, it offers the best price per sachet – nearly a 30% savings over a box of 15!

This African Sunset herbal tea is “naked”, meaning each sachet is stripped of its outer envelope, giving you more of the delicious, whole-leaf flavor with less waste. Less packaging means less impact on the environment and better savings for you. Everyone benefits!

For our Canadian tea fans, please note that all herbal teas are subject to Canadian Duty Fees.

products.body_html:
The most delicious way to serve yourself a dose of antioxidants and anti-inflammatories is this naturally caffeine-free organic blend of rooibos and potent spices like turmeric, cinnamon, ginger, coriander and more. It's healthy and tasty!

Our new Naked 15s are perfect for those who are notoriously picky about their tea and their savings. With 15 whole leaf tea sachets per sleeve, it offers the best price per sachet – nearly a 30% savings over a box of 15!

products.title: Organic Assam English Breakfast - 15 Naked Tea Sachets
products.body_html:
Bold and malty with a sweet edge, this is a flavorful every-day tea. It’s great with milk but smooth enough to drink without. Our premium whole leaf tea blend harkens back to the good old days when English Breakfast was made in a teapot.

Our new Naked 15s are perfect for those who are notoriously picky about their tea and their savings. With 15 whole leaf tea sachets per sleeve, it offers the best price per sachet – nearly a 30% savings over a box of 15!

This Assam English Breakfast black tea is “naked”, meaning each sachet is stripped of its outer envelope, giving you more of the delicious, whole-leaf flavor with less waste. Less packaging means less impact on the environment and better savings for you. Everyone benefits!

products.body_html:
Alpine Berry herbal tea is naturally sweet and tart with hibiscus, blackberry leaves, and orange peel. It's refreshing hot or iced.

Our new Naked 15s are perfect for those who are notoriously picky about their tea and their savings. With 15 whole leaf tea sachets per sleeve, it offers the best price per sachet – nearly a 30% savings over a box of 15!

products.title: Ceremonial Matcha - 1 oz Tin
products.body_html:
Our ceremonial grade matcha now in a convenient, 1oz tin! It’s everything we love: top-of-the-world tasty, portable, and accessible!

  • Super-premium Japanese ceremonial grade matcha
  • 100% organic & unsweetened
  • Bright green color with a balanced, nuanced flavor.

About 18 (1.5g) servings per tin.

products.title: Barista Matcha Tea Latte Mix
products.body_html:
This sweetened blend of 100% organic Japanese matcha and cane sugar tastes sweeter than Nice Matcha, but is still half as sweet as most latte blends. It mixes up quick and easy for delicious lattes anytime! Dairy-free, vegan, and gluten free. 

120g Sleeve - 8 servings
907g Sleeve - 60 servings
  • SWEET AND BALANCED WITH 13 GRAMS OF SUGAR/SERVING.
  • EASY 1-2-3 PREP AND DISSOLVES QUICKLY.
  • GREAT FOR LATTES, SMOOTHIES, CHILLED DRINKS AND UNIQUE SIGNATURE DRINKS
  • SHELF-STABLE
  • DAIRY-FREE, VEGAN AND GLUTEN FREE

products.title: Organic Chamomile - 50 Naked Tea Sachets
products.body_html:
Delicious little flowers — that’s our Organic Chamomile tea. A rich apple scent (in Greek, “milo” means apple) with soft honey notes and a lemon edge. Chamomile has been used for centuries to calm the mind and to aid in digestion. It’s naturally sweet, relaxing and the best chamomile tea you’ll ever have.

For our Canadian tea fans, please note that all herbal teas are subject to Canadian Duty Fees.

Get Naked!

Our new Naked 50s are perfect for those who are notoriously picky about their tea and their savings. With 50 whole leaf tea sachets per sleeve, it offers the best price per sachet – up to 40% savings over a box of 15!

This organic chamomile herbal tea is “naked”, meaning each sachet is stripped of its outer envelope, giving you more of the delicious, whole-leaf flavor with less waste. Less packaging means less impact on the environment and better savings for you. Everyone benefits!
